channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Afghan labourer’s body handed over at Torkham after temporary halt in cross-border operation
item.description: Ek Afghan shehri ki laash, jo kai dinon se Torkham border ke Zero Point par pari hui thi, aakhirkaar Juma ke din local tribal elders ke zariye Afghan authorities ke hawalay kar di gayi. Yeh developmen...

item.title: IGP Disu Plans to Limit Police Involvement in Osun Political Dispute and Similar Cases Nationwide
item.description: The Inspector General of Police, Olatunji Disu, don begin take steps to reduce how police dey entangle themselves for political palava across Nigeria, especially the one wey dey happen for Osun State....

item.title: One labourer dies and another worker injured after accidental contact with high-tension wire at construction site in Delhi
item.description: A tragic incident of electrocution took place in southwest Delhi’s Kapashera area on Thursday afternoon, resulting in the death of a 45-year-old labourer and injuries to a 32-year-old mason. According...

item.title: Iran warns of forceful retaliation after attacks on energy infrastructure escalate Middle East crisis
item.description: Iran has warned that it will demonstrate 'zero restraint' if its energy facilities are targeted again, following a dramatic escalation in the Middle East conflict. The statement from Iranian foreign m...

item.title: Tasha Tanjutco highlights creative initiatives for community impact at She Talks Asia Summit 2026
item.description: Itinampok sa She Talks Asia Summit 2026 ang makabuluhang papel ng creativity sa community development sa pamamagitan ng kuwento ni Tasha Tanjutco. Bilang isang creative leader at advocate, ibinahagi n...

item.title: Ogun police investigate death of female NYSC member linked to abortion complications
item.description: The Ogun State Police Command don begin investigation into the death of one female National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) member, wey dem call Victoria Ariyo. She dey serve for Abeokuta South Local Gover...

item.title: Provinces weigh participation in expanded Temporary Foreign Worker Program for rural areas
item.description: Several Canadian provinces have voiced concerns over the federal government’s recent decision to expand the Temporary Foreign Worker (TFW) Program for rural employers, citing a lack of prior consultat...

item.title: Dodoma Sewerage Project Faces Delays, PAC Urges Swift Completion
item.description: Mambo! The Parliamentary Standing Committee on Public Accounts (PAC) imekuwa akisema that things need to move fast on that sewerage project in Dodoma. The project, which imekadiriwa at 4.9bn/, inakabi...

item.title: Lessons Africa Can Teach the US About Respecting Leadership
item.description: This article talks about how the United States, under former President Donnie Trumpet, also called Mr Tarriffman, is struggling with governance compared to African leadership norms. The writer argues ...

item.title: Watu Tanzania recognised for expanding access to finance and tools for women entrepreneurs
item.description: As Tanzania marked International Women’s Day 2026, attention was placed on the increasing role of women in economic activities across the country. Watu Tanzania, an asset financing company, was recogn...

item.title: BJP announces Assam candidate list; allies urged to strengthen their presence
item.description: The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has recently released its candidate list for the upcoming elections in Assam. The list reflects a careful balance across various constituencies, taking into account re...

item.title: LHC Rules Only ATC Can Allow Sheikh Rashid’s Travel Abroad Under Anti-Terrorism Law
item.description: The Lahore High Court (LHC) Rawalpindi bench has overturned a previous single bench order that allowed Awami Muslim League (AML) chief Sheikh Rashid Ahmed to travel to Saudi Arabia for Umrah. On Wedne...

item.title: Treasury Introduces R54bn Incentive Scheme to Improve Metro Service Delivery and Financial Management
item.description: South Africa’s National Treasury has introduced a major incentive-based reform programme aimed at improving the performance of the country’s eight metropolitan municipalities. The initiative, known as...

item.title: Eberechi Eze shines as Arsenal beats Bayer Leverkusen to reach Champions League quarter-finals
item.description: Eberechi Eze, the Arsenal midfielder who joined from Crystal Palace for £60 million, has started showing his full potential this season. Despite being often on the bench, Eze scored a brilliant openin...

item.title: ACT Police monitor Comanchero bikie meeting amid new gang activity
item.description: This weekend, Canberra is set to host a significant gathering of approximately 180 members of the Comanchero outlaw motorcycle gang between March 20 and 22. The event is being closely monitored by ACT...

item.title: Labor expected to win big in South Australian election amid One Nation rise and robodebt report release
item.description: Saturday’s South Australian state election appears to be heading for a decisive Labor victory under Premier Peter Malinauskas, marking another strong performance for the state’s incumbent government. ...

item.title: Nigeria and UK Strengthen Cooperation on Migration, Security, and Business Travel
item.description: Nigeria and the United Kingdom don sign three important Memoranda of Understanding (MoUs) wey cover migration partnership, organised immigration crime, border security, and business visas for UK compa...

item.title: Philippine peso hits record low amid global oil price surge
item.description: The Philippine peso weakened sharply on March 19, 2026, closing at a record-low of ₱60.10 against the US dollar as global oil prices soared beyond $100 per barrel. Data from the Bankers Association of...

item.title: Joaquin Arce and Ashley Sarmiento share thoughts on friendship and fan 'ships' after 'PBB Collab 2.0'
item.description: In an interview following the finale of 'Pinoy Big Brother (PBB) Collab 2.0,' third Big Placers Joaquin Arce and Ashley Sarmiento opened up about their journey inside Kuya’s house and the fan-generate...

item.title: UK Unemployment Holds at Five-Year High Driven by Youth Job Losses
item.description: The United Kingdom's unemployment rate has remained at its highest level in five years, standing at 5.2% in the three months leading up to January 2026, according to figures released by the Office for...
